identity.mission: Create a high-density, deals-focused interface that feels like a 'Bloomberg Terminal for Shoppers'. Function over fluff. Clarity over decoration.
identity.theme_strategy: Hybrid: Light Mode Base for Trust/Readability, Dark Mode Toggle for 'Night Hunting' vibe.

headings.usage: Use for all Deal Titles, Discount Percentages, and Section Headers. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Product descriptions, metadata, admin tables. Normal tracking.

spacing_layout.density_rules: Minimal padding inside cards (p-3 or p-4). Maximize data density. No jagged bottoms.

deal_card.typography: Title: text-lg font-bold leading-tight. Price: text-xl font-black text-accent.
deal_card.badges: Absolute position top-left. Square corners. Uppercase text.
deal_card.interaction: Highlight border on hover. 'Quick View' button appears.

admin_panel.table_style: Dense. Row height 40px. Font size text-sm. Mono font for IDs.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide font-bold h-10 px-6
buttons.secondary: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-6 rounded-sm uppercase

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on backgrounds (opacity 0.02) to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard shadows for popovers: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] (Neo-Brutalist touch).
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (Stroke width 1.5px for elegance, 2px for active).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Inter' in index.css immediately.
NO ROUNDED CORNERS: Use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a sharper, more tactical look.
DENSITY IS KING: Admin tables must show 15+ rows per screen. Use 'h-8' for table rows.
COLOR DISCIPLINE: Do not use arbitrary colors. Use ONLY the defined palette.
TEST IDS: Every button must have 'data-testid'.
USE SHADCN: Heavily customize Shadcn components to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Remove rounded-xl, change to rounded-none.
GRID LAYOUT: Use the defined Bento Grid for the homepage deals. 1 Featured Deal (2x2), rest 1x1.

dos: Implement Dark Mode toggle in the Navbar.
donts: Do NOT use gradients on text.
Do NOT make the deal cards too tall; keep them compact.
